title: Error msg not correct in TiKV env
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```
create table sc (a int);
insert sc values (1), (2);
update sc set a = 4 where a > '1x';
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

same error msg

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

In unistore
```
mysql> update sc set a = 4 where a > '1x';
ERROR 1292 (22007): Truncated incorrect DOUBLE value: '1x'
```

In TiKV
```
mysql> update sc set a = 4 where a > '1x';
ERROR 1292 (22007): Truncated incorrect INTEGER value: '1x'
```

In MySQL
```
mysql> update sc set a = 4 where a > '1x';
ERROR 1292 (22007): Truncated incorrect DOUBLE value: '1x'
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value NUMERIC(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.00), (2, 'test2', 20.50);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 15.00 WHERE value > CAST('10x' AS NUMERIC);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
key_bug_features: update with invalid string comparison on integer column
